description_long: This is a large, rectangular shipping container with corrugated metal sides and a weathered, industrial appearance. The side features the MAERSK logo and a blue star emblem, indicating it is used for freight or storage purposes. The container is constructed from steel panels, with visible rust, dirt, and wear, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look. One end of the container has double doors with locking bars and hinges, designed for secure access to the interior. The top and sides are flat and ribbed, providing structural strength and durability. The overall color is a faded blue-gray with patches of rust and grime, typical of containers exposed to outdoor urban environments.
description: A large, weathered steel shipping container with corrugated sides, MAERSK branding, and double locking doors on one end.
description_view_0: The narrow end of the container, showing vertical corrugated metal panels without visible doors or branding.
description_view_1: The long side of the container, prominently displaying the MAERSK logo and blue star emblem on a weathered, ribbed metal surface.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end, featuring double doors with locking bars and hinges, used for accessing the container's interior.
description_view_3: The other long side, similar to view 1 but without any visible branding, showing only the weathered, ribbed metal surface.
